title: High-throughput immunofluorescence to validate high-affinity binders
author: Alvaro Ingles-Prieto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Protocol for high-throughput evaluation of binder candidates. The protocol can be used for the permeabilization assessment by an adaption of the blocking solution.
steps_raw: Protocol for high-throughput evaluation of binder candidates. The protocol can be used for the permeabilization assessment by an adaption of the blocking solution.
